methods.name: GetDatabaseUnits
methods.description: Returns a value from the eUnits enumeration indicating the database units for the model. All data is internally stored in the model in these units and converted to the present units as needed.
methods.signature: eUnits GetDatabaseUnits()
methods.return: Returns a value from the eUnits enumeration if successful, otherwise returns zero.

methods.name: InitializeNewModel
methods.description: This function clears the previous model and initializes the program for a new model. If it is later needed, you should save your previous model prior to calling this function.

params.name: Units
params.desc: Type: ETABSv1AddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTB8665F52_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");eUnits This is the display (present) units for the new model. Possible items in the eUnits enumeration. All numerical items are shown in the GUI in display units. All API calls use display units. All data stored internally in the model is in database units. If the length unit in the display units is inch or feet, t

methods.return: The function returns zero if a new model is successfully initialized, otherwise it returns a nonzero value.
methods.remarks: After calling the InitializeNewModel function, it is not necessary to also call the ApplicationStart function because the functionality of the ApplicationStart function is included in the InitializeNewModel function.

methods.name: SetModelIsLocked
methods.description: Locks or unlocks the model.

params.name: Lockit
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTF76E04B6_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Boolean The item is True if the model is to be locked and False if it is to be unlocked.

methods.return: Returns zero if the locked status of the model is successfully set. Otherwise it returns a nonzero value.
methods.remarks: With some exceptions, definitions and assignments can not be changed in a model while the model is locked. If an attempt is made to change a definition or assignment while the model is locked and that change is not allowed in a locked model, an error will be returned.

methods.name: AddByCoord
methods.description: Adds a new frame object whose end points are at the specified coordinates.
methods.signature:
int AddByCoord(
	double XI,
	double YI,
	double ZI,
	double XJ,
	double YJ,
	double ZJ,
	ref string Name,
	string PropName = "Default",
	string UserName = "",
	string CSys = "Global"
)

params.name: XI
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTEC8CD2A9_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Double The coordinates of the I-End of the added frame object. The coordinates are in the coordinate system defined by the CSys item.

params.name: YI
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTEC8CD2A9_2?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Double The coordinates of the I-End of the added frame object. The coordinates are in the coordinate system defined by the CSys item.

params.name: ZI
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTEC8CD2A9_3?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Double The coordinates of the I-End of the added frame object. The coordinates are in the coordinate system defined by the CSys item.

params.name: XJ
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTEC8CD2A9_4?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Double The coordinates of the J-End of the added frame object. The coordinates are in the coordinate system defined by the CSys item.

params.name: YJ
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTEC8CD2A9_5?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Double The coordinates of the J-End of the added frame object. The coordinates are in the coordinate system defined by the CSys item.

params.name: ZJ
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTEC8CD2A9_6?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Double The coordinates of the J-End of the added frame object. The coordinates are in the coordinate system defined by the CSys item.

params.name: Name
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTEC8CD2A9_7?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");StringAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTEC8CD2A9_8?cpp=%"); This is the name that the program ultimately assigns for the frame object. If no userName is specified, the program assigns a default name to the frame object. If a userName is specified and that name is not used for another frame, cable or tendon object, the

params.name: PropName
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTEC8CD2A9_9?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String This is Default, None, or the name of a defined frame section property. If it is Default, the program assigns a default section property to the frame object. If it is None, no section property is assigned to the frame object. If it is the name of a defined frame section property, that property is assigned to

params.name: UserName
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTEC8CD2A9_10?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String This is an optional user specified name for the frame object. If a UserName is specified and that name is already used for another frame object, the program ignores the UserName.

params.name: CSys
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTEC8CD2A9_11?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The name of the coordinate system in which the frame object end point coordinates are defined.

methods.return: Returns zero if the frame object is successfully added, otherwise it returns a nonzero value.
methods.remarks: Note that the End I and End J joints of the added frame object are determined based on the orientation of the object and may not be the same order as specified in the parameters of this API functions. Please use GetPoints(String, StringAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTEC8CD2A9_12?cpp=%");, StringAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTEC8CD2A9_13?cpp=%");) to check the position of the End I and End J joints.

	string Name,
	int MyType,
	eItemType ItemType = eItemType.Objects
)

params.name: Name

params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST5A8CAC76_2?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32 This is an integer from the list below, indicating the design procedure type desired for the specified frame object. Program determined = 0Steel Frame Design = 1Concrete Frame Design = 2Composite Beam Design = 3Steel Joist Design = 4No Design = 7Composite Column Design = 13

params.name: ItemType
params.desc: Type: ETABSv1AddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST5A8CAC76_3?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");eItemType This is one of the following items in the eItemType enumeration: Object = 0Group = 1SelectedObjects = 2 If this item is Objects, the assignment is made to the frame object specified by the Name item. params.name: Name

params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST612C99B9_4?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Double When MyType is 1, this is the location of the point bracing. When MyType = 2, this is the location of the start of the uniform bracing. [L] when RelDist = False.

If this item is Group, the assignment is made to all frame objects in the group specified by the Name item

methods.return: Returns zero if the lateral bracing location is successfully assigned, otherwise it returns a nonzero value.
methods.remarks: Added in v1.31.

params.name: Name

params.name: MyType

params.name: Dir
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST228DF8EF_4?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32 This is an integer between 1 and 11, indicating the direction of the load. Local 1 axis (only applies when CSys is Local)Local 2 axis (only applies when CSys is Local)Local 3 axis (only applies when CSys is Local)X direction (does not apply when CSys is Local)Y direction (does not apply when CSys is Local)Z di

params.name: Dist1
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST228DF8EF_5?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Double This is the distance from the I-End of the frame object to the start of the distributed load. This may be a relative distance (0 <= Dist1 <= 1) or an actual distance, depending on the value of the RelDist item. [L] when RelDist is False

params.name: Dist2
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST228DF8EF_6?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Double This is the distance from the I-End of the frame object to the end of the distributed load. This may be a relative distance (0 <= Dist2 <= 1) or an actual distance, depending on the value of the RelDist item. [L] when RelDist is False

params.name: Val1
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST228DF8EF_7?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Double This is the load value at the start of the distributed load. [F/L] when MyType is 1 and [FL/L] when MyType is 2

params.name: Val2
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST228DF8EF_8?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Double This is the load value at the end of the distributed load. [F/L] when MyType is 1 and [FL/L] when MyType is 2

params.name: CSys
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST228DF8EF_9?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String This is Local or the name of a defined coordinate system. It is the coordinate system in which the loads are specified.

params.name: RelDist
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST228DF8EF_10?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Boolean If this item is True, the specified Dist item is a relative distance, otherwise it is an actual distance.

params.name: Replace
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST228DF8EF_11?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Boolean If this item is True, all previous loads, if any, assigned to the specified frame object(s), in the specified load pattern, are deleted before making the new assignment.

If this item is Group, the assignment is made to all frame objects in the group specified by the Name ite

methods.name: ImportProp
methods.description: Imports a frame section property from a property file.
methods.signature:
int ImportProp(
	string Name,
	string MatProp,
	string FileName,
	string PropName,
	int Color = -1,
	string Notes = "",
	string GUID = ""
)

params.name: Name
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD6581C63_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The name of an existing or new frame section property. If this is an existing property, that property is modified; otherwise, a new property is added. This name does not need to be the same as the PropName item.

params.name: MatProp
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD6581C63_2?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The name of the material property for the section.

params.name: FileName
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD6581C63_3?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The name of the frame section property file from which to get the frame section property specified by the PropName item. In most cases you can input just the name of the property file (e.g. "AISC14.xml") and the program will be able to find it. In some cases you may have to input the full path to the property

params.name: PropName
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD6581C63_4?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The name of the frame section property, inside the property file specified by the FileName item, that is to be imported.

params.name: Color
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD6581C63_5?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32 The display color assigned to the section. If Color is specified as -1, the program will automatically assign a color.

params.name: Notes
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD6581C63_6?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The notes, if any, assigned to the section.

params.name: GUID
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD6581C63_7?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The GUID (global unique identifier), if any, assigned to the section. If this item is input as Default, the program assigns a GUID to the section.

methods.return: Returns zero if the section property is successfully initialized; otherwise it returns a nonzero value.
methods.remarks: If the property file is not found, or the specified property name is not found in the property file, the section is set to be a general section with default properties.

params.name: Name
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");StringThe name of an existing frame section property.

params.name: MatPropLong
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_2?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");StringThe name of the rebar material property for the longitudinal rebar.

params.name: MatPropConfine
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_3?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");StringThe name of the rebar material property for the confinement rebar.

params.name: Pattern
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_4?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32This is either 1 or 2, indicating the rebar configuration. ValuePattern1Rectangular2CircularFor circular frame section properties this item must be 2; otherwise an error is returned.

params.name: ConfineType
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_5?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32This is either 1 or 2, indicating the confinement bar type. ValueType1Ties2SpiralThis item applies only when Pattern = 2. If Pattern = 1, the confinement bar type is assumed to be ties.

params.name: Cover
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_6?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleThe clear cover for the confinement steel (ties). In the special case of circular reinforcement in a rectangular column, this is the minimum clear cover. [L]

params.name: NumberCBars
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_7?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32This item applies to a circular rebar configuration, Pattern = 2. It is the total number of longitudinal reinforcing bars in the column.

params.name: NumberR3Bars
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_8?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32This item applies to a rectangular rebar configuration, Pattern = 1. It is the number of longitudinal bars (including the corner bar) on each face of the column that is parallel to the local 3-axis of the column.

params.name: NumberR2Bars
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_9?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32This item applies to a rectangular rebar configuration, Pattern = 1. It is the number of longitudinal bars (including the corner bar) on each face of the column that is parallel to the local 2-axis of the column.

params.name: RebarSize
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_10?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");StringThe rebar name for the longitudinal rebar in the column.

params.name: TieSize
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_11?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");StringThe rebar name for the confinement rebar in the column.

params.name: TieSpacingLongit
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_12?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleThe longitudinal spacing of the confinement bars (ties). [L]

params.name: Number2DirTieBars
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_13?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32This item applies to a rectangular reinforcing configuration, Pattern = 1. It is the number of confinement bars (tie legs) running in the local 2-axis direction of the column.

params.name: Number3DirTieBars
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_14?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32This item applies to a rectangular reinforcing configuration, Pattern = 1. It is the number of confinement bars (tie legs) running in the local 3-axis direction of the column.

params.name: ToBeDesigned
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST2F650716_15?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");BooleanIf this item is True, the column longitudinal rebar is to be designed; otherwise it is to be checked.

methods.return: Returns zero if the rebar data is successfully assigned; otherwise it returns a nonzero value.
methods.remarks: This function applies only to the following section types. Calling this function for any other type of frame section property returns an error. RectangularCircleThe material assigned to the specified frame section property must be concrete or this function returns an error.

params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST582D7044_4?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Double

params.name: EFu

params.name: SSType

params.name: SSHysType
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST582D7044_7?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32This is 0 through 7, indicating the stress-strain curve type. ValueSSHysType0Elastic1Kinematic2Takeda3Pivot4Concrete5BRB Hardening6Degrading7Isotropic

params.name: StrainAtHardening
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST582D7044_8?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleThis item applies only when parametric stress-strain curves are used. It is the strain at the onset of strain hardening.

params.name: StrainAtMaxStress
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST582D7044_9?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleThis item applies only when parametric stress-strain curves are used. It is the strain at maximum stress. This item must be larger than the StrainAtHardening item.

params.name: StrainAtRupture
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST582D7044_10?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleThis item applies only when parametric stress-strain curves are used. It is the strain at rupture. This item must be larger than the StrainAtMaxStress item.

params.name: Temp
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST582D7044_11?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleThe temperature at which the specified data applies. The temperature must have been defined previously for the material. This item applies only if the specified material has properties that are temperature dependent. That is, it applies only if properties are specified for the material at more than one temper

methods.return: Returns zero if the data is successfully assigned; otherwise it returns a nonzero value.

methods.name: SetOutputOptionsForDisplay
methods.description: Sets the database table output options for load case results.
methods.signature:
int SetOutputOptionsForDisplay(
	bool IsUserBaseReactionLocation,
	double UserBaseReactionX,
	double UserBaseReactionY,
	double UserBaseReactionZ,
	bool IsAllModes,
	int StartMode,
	int EndMode,
	bool IsAllBucklingModes,
	int StartBucklingMode,
	int EndBucklingMode,
	int MultistepStatic,
	int NonlinearStatic,
	int ModalHistory,
	int DirectHistory,
	int Combo
)

params.name: IsUserBaseReactionLocation
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");BooleanInput Item: Indicates if the base reaction location is user specified instead of program determined.

params.name: UserBaseReactionX
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_2?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleInput Item: The global X coordinate of the user specified base reaction location. This item only applies when the IsUserBaseReactionLocation item is True.

params.name: UserBaseReactionY
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_3?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleInput Item: The global Y coordinate of the user specified base reaction location. This item only applies when the IsUserBaseReactionLocation item is True.

params.name: UserBaseReactionZ
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_4?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleInput Item: The global Z coordinate of the user specified base reaction location. This item only applies when the IsUserBaseReactionLocation item is True.

params.name: IsAllModes
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_5?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");BooleanInput Item: Indicates if results are to be displayed for all modes of modal load cases.

params.name: StartMode
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_6?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32Input Item: The first mode for which results are shown for modal load cases. This item only applies when the IsAllModes item is False.

params.name: EndMode
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_7?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32Input Item: The last mode for which results are shown for modal load cases. This item only applies when the IsAllModes item is False.

params.name: IsAllBucklingModes
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_8?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");BooleanInput Item: Indicates if results are to be displayed for all modes of buckling load cases.

params.name: StartBucklingMode
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_9?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32Input Item: The first mode for which results are shown for buckling load cases. This item only applies when the IsAllBucklingModes item is False.

params.name: EndBucklingMode
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_10?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32Input Item: The last mode for which results are shown for buckling load cases. This item only applies when the IsAllBucklingModes item is False.

params.name: MultistepStatic
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_11?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32Input Item: Indicates how multistep static load case results are displayed: 1=Envelopes, 2=Step-by-step, 3=Last Step.

params.name: NonlinearStatic
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_12?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32Input Item: Indicates how nonlinear static load case results are displayed: 1=Envelopes, 2=Step-by-step, 3=Last Step.

params.name: ModalHistory
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_13?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32Input Item: Indicates how multistep modal time history load case results are displayed: 1=Envelopes, 2=Step-by-step, 3=Last Step.

params.name: DirectHistory
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_14?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32Input Item: Indicates how direct integration time load case results are displayed: 1=Envelopes, 2=Step-by-step, 3=Last Step.

params.name: Combo
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTD224FE3B_15?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32Returned Item: Indicates how load combination results are displayed: 1=Envelopes, 2=Multiple Values If Possible.

methods.return: Returns 0 if the function executes correctly, otherwise returns nonzero

methods.name: Add
methods.description: Adds a new load pattern.
methods.signature:
int Add(
	string Name,
	eLoadPatternType MyType,
	double SelfWTMultiplier = 0,
	bool AddAnalysisCase = true
)

params.name: Name
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST7D2FF18D_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The name for the new load pattern.

params.name: MyType
params.desc: Type: ETABSv1AddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST7D2FF18D_2?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");eLoadPatternType This is one of the items in the eLoadPatternType enumeration.

params.name: SelfWTMultiplier
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST7D2FF18D_3?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Double The self weight multiplier for the new load pattern.

params.name: AddAnalysisCase
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST7D2FF18D_4?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Boolean If this item is True, a linear static load case corresponding to the new load pattern is added.

methods.return: Returns 0 if the load pattern is successfully added; otherwise it returns nonzero.
methods.remarks: An error is returned if the Name item is already used for an existing load pattern.

methods.name: ChangeName
methods.description: Applies a new name to a load pattern.
methods.signature:
int ChangeName(
	string Name,
	string NewName
)

params.name: Name
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST888AA480_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The name of a defined load pattern.

params.name: NewName
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST888AA480_2?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The new name for the load pattern.

methods.return: Returns zero if the new name is successfully applied; otherwise it returns a nonzero value.

methods.name: Count
methods.description: Retrieves the number of defined load patterns.
methods.signature: int Count()
methods.return: Returns the number of defined load patterns.

methods.name: Delete
methods.description: Deletes the specified load pattern.

params.name: Name
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LSTE33D6E89_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The name of an existing load pattern.

methods.return: Returns zero if the load pattern is successfully deleted, otherwise it returns a nonzero value.
methods.remarks: The load pattern is not deleted and the function returns an error if the load pattern is assigned to an load case or if it is the only defined load pattern.

methods.name: GetAutoSeismicCode
methods.description: Retrieves the code name used for auto seismic parameters in Quake-type load patterns.
methods.signature:
int GetAutoSeismicCode(
	string Name,
	ref string CodeName
)

params.name: Name
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST15968960_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The name of an existing Quake-type load pattern.

params.name: CodeName

methods.name: SetDesignSection
methods.description: Modifies the design section for all specified frame objects that have a concrete frame design procedure
methods.signature:
int SetDesignSection(
	string Name,
	string PropName,
	bool LastAnalysis,
	eItemType ItemType = eItemType.Objects
)

params.name: Name
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST4E6DFF58_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The name of an existing frame object or group, depending on the value of the ItemType item

params.name: PropName
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST4E6DFF58_2?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String The name of an existing frame section property to be used as the design section for the specified frame objects. This item applies only when LastAnalysis = False

params.name: LastAnalysis
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST4E6DFF58_3?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Boolean If this item is True, the design section for the specified frame objects is reset to the last analysis section for the frame object. If it is False, the design section is set to that specified by PropName

params.name: ItemType
params.desc: Type: ETABSv1AddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST4E6DFF58_4?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");eItemType This is one of the following items in the eItemType enumeration: Object = 0Group = 1SelectedObjects = 2 If this item is Objects, the assignment is made to the frame object specified by the Name item. If this item is Group, the assignment is made to all frame objects in the group specified by the Name item

methods.return: Returns zero if the design section is successfully modified; otherwise it returns a nonzero value

methods.signature: int StartDesign()
methods.return: Returns zero if the concrete frame design is successfully started; otherwise it returns a nonzero value.
methods.remarks: The function will fail if no concrete frame objects are present. It also will fail if analysis results are not available.

methods.name: AddByCoord
methods.description: Adds a new link object whose end points are at the specified coordinates.
methods.signature:
int AddByCoord(
	double XI,
	double YI,
	double ZI,
	double XJ,
	double YJ,
	double ZJ,
	ref string Name,
	bool IsSingleJoint = false,
	string PropName = "Default",
	string UserName = "",
	string CSys = "Global"
)

params.name: XI
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST30D8DEA0_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleThe X coordinate of the I-End of the added link object in the coordinate system defined by the CSys item.

params.name: YI
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST30D8DEA0_2?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleThe Y coordinate of the I-End of the added link object in the coordinate system defined by the CSys item.

params.name: ZI
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST30D8DEA0_3?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleThe Z coordinate of the I-End of the added link object in the coordinate system defined by the CSys item.

params.name: XJ
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST30D8DEA0_4?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleThe X coordinate of the J-End of the added link object in the coordinate system defined by the CSys item.

params.name: YJ
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST30D8DEA0_5?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleThe Y coordinate of the J-End of the added link object in the coordinate system defined by the CSys item.

params.name: ZJ
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST30D8DEA0_6?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");DoubleThe Z coordinate of the J-End of the added link object in the coordinate system defined by the CSys item.

params.name: Name
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST30D8DEA0_7?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");StringAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST30D8DEA0_8?cpp=%");This is the name that the program ultimately assigns for the link object. If no UserName is specified, the program assigns a default name to the link object. If a UserName is specified and that name is not used for another link object, the UserName is assigned

params.name: IsSingleJoint
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST30D8DEA0_9?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");BooleanThis item is True if a one-joint link is added and False if a two-joint link is added.

params.name: PropName
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST30D8DEA0_10?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");StringThis is either Default or the name of a defined link property. If it is Default the program assigns a default link property to the link object. If it is the name of a defined link property, that property is assigned to the link object

params.name: UserName
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST30D8DEA0_11?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String

params.name: CSys
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST30D8DEA0_12?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");StringThe name of the coordinate system in which the link object end point coordinates are defined.

methods.return: Returns zero if the link object is successfully added; otherwise it returns a nonzero value.
methods.remarks: One-joint links are not supported in ETABS.

If no UserName is specified, the program assigns a default name to the link object. If a UserName is specified and that name is not used for another link object, the UserName is assigned

params.name: PropName
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST58F760AD_6?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");StringThis is either Default or the name of a defined link property. If it is Default the program assigns a default link property to the link object. If it is the name of a defined link property, that property is assigned to the link object

params.name: UserName
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST58F760AD_7?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");String

methods.return: Returns zero if the link object is successfully added; otherwise it returns a nonzero value.
methods.remarks: One-joint links are not supported in ETABS.

methods.name: ApplicationExit
methods.description: Exits the application.

params.name: FileSave
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST38FC36A7_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");BooleanIf this item is True the existing model file is saved prior to closing the application.

methods.return: This function returns zero if the function succeeds and nonzero if it fails.
methods.remarks: If the model file is saved then it is saved with its current name. Any instance of cSapModel should be set to nothing after calling this function.

methods.name: ApplicationStart
methods.description: This function starts the application.
methods.signature: int ApplicationStart()
methods.return: This function returns zero if the application successfully starts and nonzero if it fails.
methods.remarks: When the model is not visible it does not appear on screen and it does not appear in the Windows task bar.

methods.name: GetOAPIVersionNumber
methods.description: Retrieves the API version number implemented by the GUI.
methods.signature: double GetOAPIVersionNumber()
methods.return: Returns the API version number implemented by the GUI.

methods.name: Hide
methods.description: This function hides the application. When the application is hidden it is not visible on the screen or on the Windows task bar.
methods.signature: int Hide()
methods.return: The function returns zero if the application is successfully hidden and nonzero if the function fails. If the application is already hidden, calling this function returns an error.

methods.name: InternalExec
methods.description: For internal use.

params.name: operation
params.desc: Type: SystemAddLanguageSpecificTextSet("LST74692DDD_1?cs=.|vb=.|cpp=::|nu=.|fs=.");Int32

methods.return: For internal use.

methods.name: SetAsActiveObject
methods.description: This function sets the active ETABSObject instance in the system Running Object Table (ROT), replacing the previous instance (if any).
methods.signature: int SetAsActiveObject()
methods.return: This function returns zero if the current instance is successfully added to the system ROT and nonzero if it fails.
methods.remarks: When a new ETABSObject is created using the API, it is automatically added to the system ROT if none is already present. Creation of subsequent ETABSObject instances does not alter the ROT as long as at least one active instance is present in the ROT. GetObject(String) can be used to attach to the active ETABSObject instance registered in the ROT.

methods.name: Unhide
methods.description: This function unhides the application, that is, it makes it visible. When the application is hidden, it is not visible on the screen or on the Windows task bar.
methods.signature: int Unhide()
methods.return: The function returns zero if the application is successfully unhidden (set visible) and nonzero if the function fails. If the application is already visible (not hidden) calling this function returns an error.

methods.name: UnsetAsActiveObject
methods.description: This function removes the ETABSObject instance from the system Running Object Table (ROT).
methods.signature: int UnsetAsActiveObject()
methods.return: This function returns zero if the current instance is successfully removed from the ROT and nonzero if it fails or if the current instance is not in the ROT.

methods.name: Visible
methods.description: This function gets the application visibility.
methods.signature: bool Visible()
methods.return: Returns True if the application is visible on the screen, otherwise it returns False.
